description: Documentation site for NepDate, a zero-dependency .NET library for Bikram Sambat (BS) date conversion, smart parsing with 100+ month-name spellings, fiscal year operations, calendar metadata (tithi, public holidays, festivals for 2001-2089 BS), NepaliDateRange with set operations, bulk conversion, and serialization. MIT licensed. NuGet: https://www.nuget.org/packages/NepDate/

resources.name: Homepage
resources.description: Library overview, performance benchmarks (4.55 ns/op BS-to-AD, zero allocations), installation, quick start, feature highlights, FAQ

resources.name: API Reference
resources.description: Complete API reference for NepDate v2.0.7. Every public method, property, enum, and exception documented with C# signatures and working code examples.

resources.name: Changelog
resources.description: Version history and release notes for all NepDate releases from v1.x to v2.0.7.

resources.name: API Reference (Markdown)
resources.description: Full API reference in markdown format optimized for AI agent consumption.

resources.name: Full Documentation (LLM)
resources.description: Complete library documentation in plain text optimized for LLM context windows.

resources.name: Agent Skill Document
resources.description: Structured skill document teaching agents the NepDate library API.

resources.name: NuGet Package
resources.description: NepDate NuGet package page with download counts and package metadata.

resources.description: NepDate source code, issues, and release history on GitHub.
